description_long: This is a single-story brick bungalow with a hip roof and a modest, rectangular footprint. The exterior walls are clad in reddish-brown brick, and the roof is a muted gray, sloping gently on all sides. Large, white-framed windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and sides, allowing ample natural light into the interior. A small, paved driveway leads to a parking area bordered by low green hedges, where a white car is parked. The main entrance features a white door with glass panels, and there is a secondary side entrance visible. The overall design is simple and functional, with a focus on suburban residential comfort.
description: A brick, single-story bungalow with a hip roof, large white-framed windows, and a driveway with a parked car bordered by hedges.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the side of the bungalow with the driveway, parked car, and a side entrance with large windows.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the rear of the bungalow, featuring a set of large windows and a small overhang above the back entrance.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the opposite side of the bungalow, showing the driveway and car from a different angle, with more of the side windows visible.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the front facade, including the main entrance door, symmetrical windows, and the driveway with the car and hedges.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
